AIConfiguration.msdyn_customconfiguration:
{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are forecasting next-month demand for ice cream flavors based on historical orders.

INPUT (JSON):
 "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"history"},{"type":"literal","text":" = { flavor_name, monthly_units: [{year, month, units}], category, seasonal_start, seasonal_end }[]
 "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"target_month"},{"type":"literal","text":" = "YYYY-MM"

FORMAT: 
Format as nice readable markdown using markdown design principles. Do something to keep if visually nice, not like a wall of text. Use at least one emoji in the heading, and elsewhere (sparsely) as appropriate. Display the main results in a table.

TASK: For each flavor in history, output:
 - flavor
 - predicted_units (integer)
 - reason (one sentence citing prior-year same-month or trend)

PRIORITY RULES:
 • If target_month is within (seasonal_start, seasonal_end), confidence is at least MEDIUM.
 • If target_month is outside the seasonal window for a Seasonal-category flavor, predicted_units is 0 with reason "out of season".
 • If history has prior-year same-month data, use it as the primary anchor.
 • If history is sparse (< 3 data points), confidence is LOW.

RULES:
 • Use ONLY the numbers in the input.
 • Never invent flavors not in the input."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"history","text":"history","type":"text"},{"id":"target_month","text":"target_month","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are forecasting next-month demand for ice cream flavors based on historical orders.

INPUT (JSON):
 "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"history"},{"type":"literal","text":" = { flavor_name, monthly_units: [{year, month, units}], category, seasonal_start, seasonal_end }[]
 "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"target_month"},{"type":"literal","text":" = "YYYY-MM"

 OUTPUT FORMAT — respond with ONLY valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences:
 {
 "target_month": "<YYYY-MM>",
 "flavors": [
 {
 "flavor": "<flavor name>",
 "predicted_units": <integer>,
 "confidence": "HIGH",
 "reason": "<one sentence>"
 }
 ]
 }
 RULES:
 • confidence must be exactly one of: HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW
 • Seasonal flavors outside their window → predicted_units: 0, confidence: HIGH, reason: "out of season"
 • Fewer than 3 historical data points → confidence: LOW
 • Output ONLY the JSON. No text before or after it.

TASK: For each flavor in history, output:
 - flavor
 - predicted_units (integer)
 - reason (one sentence citing prior-year same-month or trend)

PRIORITY RULES:
 • If target_month is within (seasonal_start, seasonal_end), confidence is at least MEDIUM.
 • If target_month is outside the seasonal window for a Seasonal-category flavor, predicted_units is 0 with reason "out of season".
 • If history has prior-year same-month data, use it as the primary anchor.
 • If history is sparse (< 3 data points), confidence is LOW."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"history","text":"history","type":"text"},{"id":"target_month","text":"target_month","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["json"],"jsonSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"target_month":{"type":"string"},"flavors":{"type":"array"}}},"jsonExamples":[{"target_month":"","flavors":[]}]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an analyst summarizing real sales data from Brain Freeze ice cream shops.

 INPUT (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"sales_rows"},{"type":"literal","text":" 

 TASK: Identify the top 3 products by revenue from the data above. For each, report:
 - Product name
 - Total revenue (sum across the period, USD)
 - Units sold
 - One sentence on what's driving its performance, based ONLY on signals visible in the data

FORMAT: Respond in markdown.

 Start with: ## 🍦 Top Sellers — Last 90 Days

 Then one block per product, ranked 1–3:

 **#[rank] [Product Name]**
 Revenue: $[X] | Units sold: [X]
 [One sentence on performance, based only on data signals.]

 End with a **📌 Takeaway:** line summarizing overall trend.

 RULES — strictly enforced:
 • Use ONLY the numbers present in the input. Never estimate, extrapolate, or invent values.
 • If a number is not in the data, write "n/a".
 • Do not name products that do not appear in the input."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"sales_rows","text":"sales_rows","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are an analyst summarizing real sales data from Brain Freeze ice cream shops.

 INPUT (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"sales_rows"},{"type":"literal","text":" 

 TASK: Identify the top 3 products by revenue from the data above. For each, report:
 - Product name
 - Total revenue (sum across the period, USD)
 - Units sold
 - One sentence on what's driving its performance, based ONLY on signals visible in the data

 OUTPUT FORMAT — respond with ONLY valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences:
 {
 "summary": "<one-sentence overall takeaway>",
 "top_products": [
 { "rank": 1, "product": "<product name>", "revenue": <number>, "units": <integer>, "driver": "<one sentence>" },
 { "rank": 2, "product": "<product name>", "revenue": <number>, "units": <integer>, "driver": "<one sentence>" },
 { "rank": 3, "product": "<product name>", "revenue": <number>, "units": <integer>, "driver": "<one sentence>" }
 ]
 }
 RULES — strictly enforced:
 • Use ONLY the numbers in the input. Never estimate, extrapolate, or invent values.
 • Output ONLY the JSON object. No text before or after it.
 • Do not name products that do not appear in the input.
"}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"sales_rows","text":"sales_rows","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["json"],"jsonSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"summary":{"type":"string"},"top_products":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"rank":{"type":"number"},"product":{"type":"string"},"revenue":{"type":"number"},"units":{"type":"number"},"driver":{"type":"string"}},"required":["rank","product","revenue","units","driver"]}}}},"jsonExamples":[{"summary":"The top three products by revenue are driven by their high unit sales and consistent pricing across the period.","top_products":[{"rank":1,"product":"Vanilla Cone","revenue":12500,"units":500,"driver":"High unit sales of 500 cones at a steady price contribute to its leading revenue."},{"rank":2,"product":"Chocolate Sundae","revenue":9600,"units":320,"driver":"Strong demand with 320 units sold at a premium price drives its revenue."},{"rank":3,"product":"Strawberry Shake","revenue":7200,"units":240,"driver":"Consistent sales volume of 240 shakes at a moderate price supports its revenue."}]}]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are evaluating ice cream shop promotions.

INPUT (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"promo_metrics"},{"type":"literal","text":" — array of { promo_name, promo_code, order_count, revenue, total_discount, start_date, end_date, status }

TASK: For each promotion, recommend one of: EXTEND, MODIFY, END. Justify with the specific metric.

FORMAT: Respond in markdown.

 Start with: ## 📊 Promotion Performance Review

 Then two sections:

 ### ✅ Recommended to EXTEND
 One bullet per promotion:
 • **[Name]** ([Code]) — [orders] orders, $[revenue] revenue, [X]x rev/discount ratio

 ### ⚠️ Recommended to MODIFY
 One bullet per promotion:
 • **[Name]** ([Code]) — [orders] orders, $[revenue] revenue — [one-phrase fix, e.g. "reduce discount" or "boost marketing"]

 End with a **📌 Summary:** line: X promotions strong, Y need attention.

 ---

RULES:
 • Recommendations must be supported by the input numbers; no speculation.
 • If order_count is 0, recommend END unless the promotion has not yet started.
 • If revenue > 5x total_discount AND order_count > 10, recommend EXTEND.
 • Otherwise default to MODIFY and explain what to change."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"promo_metrics","text":"promo_metrics","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are evaluating ice cream shop promotions.

INPUT (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"promo_metrics"},{"type":"literal","text":" — array of { promo_name, promo_code, order_count, revenue, total_discount, start_date, end_date, status }

TASK: For each promotion, recommend one of: EXTEND, MODIFY, END. Justify with the specific metric.

OUTPUT FORMAT — respond with ONLY valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences:
 {
 "promos": [
 {
 "name": "<promotion name>",
 "code": "<promo code>",
 "status": "active",
 "recommendation": "EXTEND",
 "justification": "<one sentence citing exact numbers>",
 "order_count": <number>,
 "revenue": <number>,
 "total_discount": <number>
 } 
 ] 
 }
 RULES:
 • recommendation must be exactly one of: EXTEND, MODIFY, END
 • If order_count is 0, recommend END unless the promo has not started yet
 • If revenue > 5x total_discount AND order_count > 10, recommend EXTEND
 • Otherwise recommend MODIFY
 • Output ONLY the JSON. No text before or after it."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"promo_metrics","text":"promo_metrics","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["json"],"jsonSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"promos":{"type":"array"}}},"jsonExamples":[{"promos":[]}]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are a pricing analyst for a Brain Freeze ice cream shop.

MENU DATA (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"menu_data"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Contains:
 products: [{freeze_name, freeze_producttype, freeze_size, freeze_baseprice, freeze_isactive}]
 flavors: [{freeze_name, freeze_category, freeze_pricemodifier, freeze_isavailable}]
 toppings: [{freeze_name, freeze_category, freeze_price, freeze_ispremium}]
 tax_rate: {freeze_jurisdiction, freeze_taxpercentage}

USER REQUEST: "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"user_request"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Format: "Item: <description>. Toppings: <list or none>. Price change: <% or no>"

TASK:
1. Match the user's item to the closest product in menu_data.products. State which product you matched (name, type, size).
2. Match the user's flavor (if mentioned) to menu_data.flavors. If no flavor mentioned, use flavor_modifier = 0.
3. Match the user's toppings to menu_data.toppings (by name). If "none", toppings_total = 0.
4. Compute CURRENT PRICE:
 - base_price = product.freeze_baseprice
 - flavor_modifier = matched flavor's freeze_pricemodifier (0 if none)
 - toppings_total = sum of matched topping freeze_price values
 - subtotal = base_price + flavor_modifier + toppings_total
 - tax = subtotal × (tax_rate.freeze_taxpercentage / 100)
 - total = subtotal + tax
5. If price_change is a number (not "no"): compute PROPOSED PRICE:
 - proposed_subtotal = subtotal × (1 + price_change / 100)
 - proposed_tax = proposed_subtotal × (tax_rate.freeze_taxpercentage / 100)
 - proposed_total = proposed_subtotal + proposed_tax
 - delta_total = proposed_total − total
6. IMPACT: estimate revenue effect assuming 20–50 units sold per day at current price. Apply a stated elasticity assumption (e.g., "assuming −0.8 price elasticity for a premium item") and provide a 90-day revenue delta range (low/high).

FORMAT:

 RETURN MARKDOWN with the following format:

 CURRENT PRICE
 Base: $X.XX
 Flavor modifier: $X.XX
 Toppings: $X.XX (list each topping and its price)
 Subtotal: $X.XX
 Tax (X%): $X.XX
 TOTAL: $X.XX

 PROPOSED PRICE (if applicable)
 New subtotal: $X.XX (+$X.XX / +X%)
 New tax: $X.XX
 NEW TOTAL: $X.XX (+$X.XX / +X%)

 IMPACT (if applicable)
 Elasticity assumption: <state clearly>
 Estimated 90-day revenue change: −$X,XXX to +$X,XXX (low / high range)

RULES:
 • Use ONLY the prices from menu_data. Do not invent values.
 • Show all arithmetic steps explicitly so the manager can verify them.
 • If a requested item, flavor, or topping is not found in the data, say so and use the closest match.
 • If price_change is "no" or 0, omit the PROPOSED PRICE and IMPACT sections entirely."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"menu_data","text":"menu_data","type":"text"},{"id":"user_request","text":"user_request","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are a pricing analyst for a Brain Freeze ice cream shop.

MENU DATA (JSON): "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"menu_data"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Contains:
 products: [{freeze_name, freeze_producttype, freeze_size, freeze_baseprice, freeze_isactive}]
 flavors: [{freeze_name, freeze_category, freeze_pricemodifier, freeze_isavailable}]
 toppings: [{freeze_name, freeze_category, freeze_price, freeze_ispremium}]
 tax_rate: {freeze_jurisdiction, freeze_taxpercentage}

USER REQUEST: "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"user_request"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
 Format: "Item: <description>. Toppings: <list or none>. Price change: <% or no>"

TASK:
1. Match the user's item to the closest product in menu_data.products. State which product you matched (name, type, size).
2. Match the user's flavor (if mentioned) to menu_data.flavors. If no flavor mentioned, use flavor_modifier = 0.
3. Match the user's toppings to menu_data.toppings (by name). If "none", toppings_total = 0.
4. Compute CURRENT PRICE:
 - base_price = product.freeze_baseprice
 - flavor_modifier = matched flavor's freeze_pricemodifier (0 if none)
 - toppings_total = sum of matched topping freeze_price values
 - subtotal = base_price + flavor_modifier + toppings_total
 - tax = subtotal × (tax_rate.freeze_taxpercentage / 100)
 - total = subtotal + tax
5. If price_change is a number (not "no"): compute PROPOSED PRICE:
 - proposed_subtotal = subtotal × (1 + price_change / 100)
 - proposed_tax = proposed_subtotal × (tax_rate.freeze_taxpercentage / 100)
 - proposed_total = proposed_subtotal + proposed_tax
 - delta_total = proposed_total − total
6. IMPACT: estimate revenue effect assuming 20–50 units sold per day at current price. Apply a stated elasticity assumption (e.g., "assuming −0.8 price elasticity for a premium item") and provide a 90-day revenue delta range (low/high).

OUTPUT FORMAT — respond with ONLY valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences:
 {
 "matched_product": "<name, type, size>",
 "current_price": {
 "base": <number>,
 "flavor_modifier": <number>,
 "toppings": [{ "name": "<topping name>", "price": <number> }],
 "toppings_total": <number>,
 "subtotal": <number>,
 "tax_rate_pct": <number>,
 "tax_amount": <number>,
 "total": <number>
 },
 "proposed_price": {
 "subtotal": <number>, "tax_amount": <number>, "total": <number>,
 "delta_total": <number>, "delta_pct": <number>
 },
 "impact": {
 "elasticity": "<stated assumption>",
 "revenue_low": <number>,
 "revenue_high": <number>
 }
 }
 Set proposed_price and impact to null if price_change is "no" or 0.
 RULES: Use ONLY prices from menu_data. Output ONLY the JSON. No text before or after."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"menu_data","text":"menu_data","type":"text"},{"id":"user_request","text":"user_request","type":"text"}],"formulas":[],"data":[],"output":{"formats":["json"],"jsonSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"matched_product":{"type":"string"},"current_price":{"type":"object","properties":{"base":{"type":"number"},"flavor_modifier":{"type":"number"},"toppings":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"price":{"type":"number"}},"required":["name","price"]}},"toppings_total":{"type":"number"},"subtotal":{"type":"number"},"tax_rate_pct":{"type":"number"},"tax_amount":{"type":"number"},"total":{"type":"number"}}},"proposed_price":{"type":"object","properties":{"subtotal":{"type":"number"},"tax_amount":{"type":"number"},"total":{"type":"number"},"delta_total":{"type":"number"},"delta_pct":{"type":"number"}}},"impact":{"type":"object","properties":{"elasticity":{"type":"string"},"revenue_low":{"type":"number"},"revenue_high":{"type":"number"}}}}},"jsonExamples":[{"matched_product":"Vanilla Freeze, Ice Cream, Medium","current_price":{"base":4.5,"flavor_modifier":0.5,"toppings":[{"name":"Chocolate Chips","price":0.75},{"name":"Sprinkles","price":0.5}],"toppings_total":1.25,"subtotal":6.25,"tax_rate_pct":8.25,"tax_amount":0.515625,"total":6.765625},"proposed_price":{"subtotal":6.875,"tax_amount":0.5671875,"total":7.4421875,"delta_total":0.6765625,"delta_pct":9.999999999999998},"impact":{"elasticity":"assuming −0.8 price elasticity for a premium item","revenue_low":10920,"revenue_high":27300}}]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":null},"code":"","signature":""}

{"version":"GptDynamicPrompt-2","prompt":[{"type":"literal","text":"You are given:
- An uploaded competitor flyer document: "},{"type":"inputVariable","id":"FlyerFile"},{"type":"literal","text":" 
- Direct access to the Dataverse table: freeze_promosuggestion "},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_airationale","text":"Promo Suggestion.AI Rationale"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_approvalstatus","text":"Promo Suggestion.Approval Status"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_competitorend","text":"Promo Suggestion.Competitor End"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_competitorname","text":"Promo Suggestion.Competitor Name"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_competitorpromodetails","text":"Promo Suggestion.Competitor Promo Details"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_competitorstart","text":"Promo Suggestion.Competitor Start"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_name","text":"Promo Suggestion.Name"},{"type":"data","id":"freeze_promosuggestion.freeze_promosuggestionid","text":"Promo Suggestion.Promo Suggestion"},{"type":"literal","text":" 

Your tasks:
1. Analyze the FlyerFile to extract the competitor's name and promotional details.
2. Devise a creative counter-promotion and write a short rationale.
3. Automatically write and execute a Python script inside the secure code interpreter sandbox to insert a new row into the freeze_promosuggestion table with these exact mappings:
 - freeze_name: "Response to [Insert Extracted Competitor Name]"
 - freeze_suggestedpromotitle: [Your suggested counter-promotion title]
 - freeze_suggestedpromodetails: [Your suggested counter-promotion details]
 - freeze_airationale: [Your rationale, strictly keeping it under 100 characters]
 - freeze_approvalstatus: 240390000 (Set to the integer value for the "Created" status)
 - freeze_reviewercomments: null (This should be left blank/null on initial creation)
 - freeze_sourcedocumentlink: [SourceDocumentLink]
 - freeze_competitorname: [Extracted competitor name]
 - freeze_competitorpromodetails: [Extracted competitor details]
 - freeze_competitorstart: [ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DD" if extracted, otherwise null]
 - freeze_competitorend: [ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DD" if extracted, otherwise null]

Ensure that dates are correctly formatted or written as null to avoid API database write errors."}],"definitions":{"inputs":[{"id":"FlyerFile","text":"FlyerFile","type":"document"}],"formulas":[],"data":[{"id":"freeze_promosuggestion","displayName":"Promo Suggestion","type":"dataverseTable","filters":[]}],"output":{"formats":["text"]}},"modelParameters":{"modelType":"gpt-41-mini","gptParameters":{"temperature":0}},"settings":{"recordRetrievalLimit":30,"shouldPreserveRecordLinks":null,"runtime":"codeinterpreter","enableExtendedExecution":false},"code":"
import logging
import io
import re
import datetime
from typing import Optional

import pdfminer.high_level
import pdfminer.layout
from workerinterfaces import ExecutorInterface, ConnectorClient, HttpMethod, ExecutionResult, read_multiple_files_from_input

class PromptExecutor(ExecutorInterface):
 async def execute(self, logger: logging.Logger, connector_client: ConnectorClient, input: dict) -> ExecutionResult:
 logger.info("Starting execution of Promo Suggestion creation from competitor flyer.")
 
 # Read FlyerFile from inputs
 message_id = input.get("RequestId", "")
 flyer_files = read_multiple_files_from_input(input, message_id, ["FlyerFile"])
 flyer_file = flyer_files.get("FlyerFile")

 if flyer_file is None:
 msg = "FlyerFile input is missing or could not be read."
 logger.error(msg)
 return ExecutionResult(status_code=400, headers={}, body={"text": msg})

 # Extract text from PDF flyer if possible
 flyer_text = ""
 try:
 if isinstance(flyer_file, io.BytesIO):
 # Use pdfminer to extract text from in-memory PDF file
 flyer_file.seek(0)
 laparams = pdfminer.layout.LAParams()
 flyer_text = pdfminer.high_level.extract_text(flyer_file, laparams=laparams)
 logger.info("Extracted text from FlyerFile using pdfminer.")
 elif isinstance(flyer_file, str):
 # It's a path - try to open and extract text
 with open(flyer_file, "rb") as f:
 laparams = pdfminer.layout.LAParams()
 flyer_text = pdfminer.high_level.extract_text(f, laparams=laparams)
 logger.info(f"Extracted text from FlyerFile at path {flyer_file}.")
 else:
 logger.warning("FlyerFile format not recognized for text extraction.")
 except Exception as e:
 logger.error(f"Error extracting text from FlyerFile: {e}")
 flyer_text = ""

 if not flyer_text:
 msg = "No text could be extracted from the flyer document. Unable to proceed."
 logger.error(msg)
 return ExecutionResult(status_code=400, headers={}, body={"text": msg})

 # Sanitize extracted text to prevent injection or control chars
 flyer_text = "".join(ch for ch in flyer_text if ch.isprintable() or ch in "\r\n\t ")

 logger.info(f"Flyer text extracted (first 500 chars): {flyer_text[:500]}")

 # Heuristic extraction:
 # Extract competitor name - try to find a competitor name phrase or the first line with a name-like pattern.
 # For example, search for lines containing "competitor" or use the first non-empty line
 lines = [line.strip() for line in flyer_text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
 competitor_name = None
 competitor_promo_details = None

 # Attempt to find competitor name by looking for keyword "competitor" context or by heuristics
 # If not found, fallback to first line
 candidate_lines = []
 for line in lines:
 if re.search(r"\bcompetitor\b", line, re.I):
 candidate_lines.append(line)
 if candidate_lines:
 competitor_name = candidate_lines[0]
 else:
 competitor_name = lines[0] if lines else "Unknown Competitor"
 competitor_name = competitor_name[:100] # Limit length

 logger.info(f"Extracted competitor name: {competitor_name}")

 # Extract promo details - take first several lines after competitor name or any large text block detected
 # Attempt to find promotional details near competitor_name line
 # Aggregate lines following competitor name until empty line or max limit
 try:
 start_index = lines.index(competitor_name)
 except ValueError:
 start_index = 0
 promo_lines = []
 for line in lines[start_index + 1 : start_index + 20]:
 if not line.strip():
 break
 promo_lines.append(line)
 competitor_promo_details = " ".join(promo_lines)
 if not competitor_promo_details:
 competitor_promo_details = flyer_text[:300] # fallback first 300 chars from text
 competitor_promo_details = competitor_promo_details[:1000] # limit length

 logger.info(f"Extracted competitor promo details (first 200 chars): {competitor_promo_details[:200]}")

 # Extract competitor promo dates - search for date patterns (YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY, or Month Day Year)
 # We try to parse start and end dates from the flyer text
 def find_date(text: str) -> Optional[str]:
 # Try common ISO pattern first
 iso_match = re.search(r"(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})", text)
 if iso_match:
 return iso_match.group(1)
 # Try MM/DD/YYYY or M/D/YYYY pattern
 mdys = re.findall(r'(\b\d{1,2}[/-]\d{1,2}[/-]\d{4}\b)', text)
 for dt in mdys:
 try:
 dt_parsed = datetime.datetime.strptime(dt, "%m/%d/%Y")
 iso_str = dt_parsed.date().isoformat()
 return iso_str
 except Exception:
 try:
 dt_parsed = datetime.datetime.strptime(dt, "%m-%d-%Y")
 iso_str = dt_parsed.date().isoformat()
 return iso_str
 except Exception:
 continue
 # Try Month Day, Year like January 1, 2023
 month_day_year = re.findall(
 r'([Jj]anuary|[Ff]ebruary|[Mm]arch|[Aa]pril|[Mm]ay|[Jj]une|[Jj]uly|[Aa]ugust|[Ss]eptember|[Oo]ctober|[Nn]ovember|[Dd]ecember) \d{1,2}, \d{4}',
 text,
 )
 if month_day_year:
 try:
 dt_parsed = datetime.datetime.strptime(month_day_year[0], "%B %d, %Y")
 return dt_parsed.date().isoformat()
 except Exception:
 pass
 return None

 # Search flyer text around competitor promo details for dates
 combined_search_text = competitor_promo_details + " " + competitor_name

 competitor_start_date = find_date(combined_search_text)
 competitor_end_date = None

 # Try to find end date near "to" or "end" keywords (simple heuristic)
 end_date_match = re.search(
 r'(?:to|until|through|thru)\s+(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}|\d{1,2}[/-]\d{1,2}[/-]\d{4}|[A-Za-z]+ \d{1,2}, \d{4})',
 flyer_text,
 re.I,
 )
 if end_date_match:
 end_date_raw = end_date_match.group(1)
 competitor_end_date = find_date(end_date_raw)

 logger.info(f"Extracted competitor start date: {competitor_start_date}")
 logger.info(f"Extracted competitor end date: {competitor_end_date}")

 # Simple creative counter-promotion generation - heuristic only
 suggested_title = f"Beat {competitor_name} Promo"
 suggested_details = f"Our exclusive offer surpasses {competitor_name}'s deal. Don't miss out!"
 rationale = f"Countering {competitor_name} promo to increase market share."
 # Truncate rationale to 100 characters max
 rationale = rationale[:100]

 # Prepare payload for Dataverse
 entity_set_name = "freeze_promosuggestions"
 data = {
 "freeze_name": f"Response to {competitor_name}",
 "freeze_suggestedpromotitle": suggested_title,
 "freeze_suggestedpromodetails": suggested_details,
 "freeze_airationale": rationale,
 "freeze_approvalstatus": 240390000, # Created status value
 "freeze_reviewercomments": None,
 "freeze_sourcedocumentlink": "FlyerFile", # Can set to the input key or implement a proper link if available
 "freeze_competitorname": competitor_name,
 "freeze_competitorpromodetails": competitor_promo_details,
 "freeze_competitorstart": competitor_start_date,
 "freeze_competitorend": competitor_end_date,
 }

 logger.info(f"Data payload for Dataverse create: {data}")

 # Make POST request to create new freeze_promosuggestion record
 path = f"/api/data/v9.2/{entity_set_name}"
 try:
 response = await connector_client.make_request(
 connector_name="dataverse",
 method=HttpMethod.POST,
 path=path,
 content_type="application/json",
 body=data,
 )
 logger.info(f"Dataverse create record response status: {response.status_code}")
 if response.status_code in [200, 201, 204]:
 entity_id_header = response.headers.get("OData-EntityId")
 if entity_id_header:
 match = re.search(r"\(([^)]+)\)", entity_id_header)
 record_id = match.group(1) if match else "Unknown ID"
 logger.info(f"New freeze_promosuggestion record created with id: {record_id}")
 output_text = (
 f"Successfully created new promo suggestion with ID: {record_id}\n\n"
 f"Competitor: {competitor_name}\n"
 f"Suggested Title: {suggested_title}\n"
 f"Rationale (<=100 chars): {rationale}"
 )
 else:
 output_text = (
 "Successfully created new promo suggestion record, but could not retrieve the record ID."
 )
 else:
 output_text = f"Failed to create promo suggestion, response code: {response.status_code}"
 logger.error(output_text)
 except Exception as e:
 output_text = f"Exception during Dataverse record creation: {e}"
 logger.error(output_text)

 return ExecutionResult(
 status_code=200,
 headers={},
 body={"text": output_text}
 )
","signature":"AQAAAK4AAADvu797Ikdlb2dyYXBoeSI6InVzIiwiRW52aXJvbm1lbnQiOiJwcm9kIiwiQ2x1c3RlcklkIjoid3VzIiwiS2V5VmVyc2lvbiI6IjhiNGY0MGMwOTRlMjRmYmVhMWE1NTdkNDZiZDYwNmU4IiwiU2lnbmF0dXJlVmVyc2lvbiI6InYxIiwiU2lnbmF0dXJlRGF0ZUJpbmFyeSI6NTI1MDg0Mzg1MDY3NTM0MzU4OX0gAAAA41EL+U8eWuPkJuuTNR8L9e8docgmfQCbPgq8ziGwJVA="}
